senses.gloss: Speisepilz mit großem fleischfarben-ockergelblichem Fruchtkörper aus der Familie der Gluckenartigen
senses.gloss_en: edible mushroom with large orange-yellow fruiting body from the family of Agaricus species
senses.gloss_en_full: an edible fungus with a large fleshy pale ochre-yellow fruiting body belonging to the hen-of-the-woods family
